title: zanthoxylum rubescens var. dispermum
intro: Zanthoxylum rubescens var. dispermum, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a plant species in the rutaceae family, characterized by its distinctive prickly stems and leaves. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum rubescens var. dispermum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
